name: Wild Rice and Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb. sliced fresh mushrooms (partly portabella is excellent, but any combination of fresh and canned is fine)
1/2 cup soy sauce + 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar
1 cup cooked wild rice (prepare by cooking in 2 cups water for 30 mins.)
1/2 lb. fresh spinach, broken into small pieces (wash well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large pot with Pam.
2. Combine chopped onion, celery, Chinese cabbage, and mushrooms in the pot.
3. Add garlic.
4. Sprinkle the first soy/broth/aminos mixture over the vegetables and sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
5. If desired, sauté the mushrooms separately.
6. Add the rest of the ingredients: cooked wild rice, barley, remaining soy sauce and balsamic vinegar, vegetable broth, water, salt, and black pepper.
7. Simmer covered for 2 hours.
